prompt: a triage bot that asks patients about their chest pain and tells them whether to go to the ER
notes: RFC 0001 use case 15 (triage liability) — out of platform scope by prior analysis. GOAL.md bar 7: refusal with a written reason is a trust feature. Enforced by the Phase 0 refusal screen (src/refusals.rs, #12): describe answers 422 with the written reason, records app.refused, and scaffolds nothing. must_pass — a regression here fails the run.
